$comment: Preset for sdlc-security-reviewer. Stage 8 (Security). Runs secret scan, auth flow validation, dependency audit, and OWASP top-10 endpoint checks.

sub_agent.description: Four-check security audit producing a structured finding.

gate_contribution.rationale: Stage 8 gate cannot pass with any unresolved critical security finding.

notes: Best combined with gate-evidence-collector and an organization-specific compliance agent (HIPAA, PCI, GDPR).
Run this preset on every PR that touches auth, secrets, or external endpoints — not only at Stage 8 gate.
